retry_reason: Failure is due to allocation failure; retrying may succeed later but is not part of the wrapper's contract—callers are expected to propagate the error.
contract_summary: Get-or-create wrapper for a dso in the dsos list. Returns a dso with an acquired reference (either from an existing entry via __dsos__find_id which increments the refcount, or from a newly created entry via __dsos__addnew_id which sets the refcount to 1). The caller holds a reference on the returned dso and must eventually release it with a corresponding put (e.g., dso__put). If the function returns NULL, allocation failed and no reference was acquired. The dsos->lock must be held in shared mode (SHARED_LOCKS_REQUIRED).

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to acquire a reference to a dso (via get on existing or set on new) and return it to the caller. The only non-refcount logic is a minor call to __dso__improve_id to update metadata.

check.reason: The callee __dsos__find_id is a get function for its return value, incrementing refcnt.refs. The function returns a dso with increased refcount (either from __dsos__find_id or __dsos__addnew_id). The access path dso.refcnt.refs and type chain dso--refcount_struct--atomic_t are consistent with the code and callee information.
